sourceProductCards.name: Tiny Workflow
sourceProductCards.coreMechanism: Turns a narrow user request into a scoped checklist with ranked next actions and clear review checkpoints.
sourceProductCards.transferableStructure: Convert a messy domain request into a checklist, review queue, and artifact handoff.
sourceProductCards.whyItGotAttention: The demo made a tedious domain workflow feel concrete, guided, and immediately shareable.
sourceProductCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy the fixture name, domain, or exact checklist framing.
